common: realistic cinematic horror game transition, vertical mobile portrait shot, smooth forward camera movement through a wooden doorway, preserve exact architecture, empty environment, period-neutral, no people, no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no collapse, no melting, no creature, no body, professional atmospheric game footage
negative: person, face, body, creature, readable text, logo, watermark, cartoon, painting, melting architecture, collapsing room, explosion, gore, extra doors, duplicated hallway, sci-fi, futuristic, neon, hologram, tessellated pattern, repeating texture, mosaic tile, grid pattern, interlocking pattern, repeating squares, kaleidoscope, fractal artifact

bedroom_to_hallway.mp4.label: bedroom to hallway
bedroom_to_hallway.mp4.promptText: camera leaves a plain bedroom past the lace curtains and the unlit lamp, passes through the only wooden bedroom door, and ends in the long central hallway

hallway_to_bedroom.mp4.label: bedroom from hallway
hallway_to_bedroom.mp4.promptText: camera moves from the central hallway through a wooden bedroom door, and ends inside a plain bedroom with the lace curtain shifting at the window

bathroom_to_hallway.mp4.label: bathroom to hallway
bathroom_to_hallway.mp4.promptText: camera leaves a small white-tiled bathroom past the basin and shower curtain, passes through the only wooden bathroom door, and ends in the long central hallway

hallway_to_bathroom.mp4.label: bathroom from hallway
hallway_to_bathroom.mp4.promptText: camera moves from the central hallway through a wooden bathroom door, and ends inside a small white-tiled bathroom with a single overhead bulb

cellar_to_hallway.mp4.label: cellar to hallway
cellar_to_hallway.mp4.promptText: camera climbs the wooden steps out of a dim cellar, passes through the only wooden cellar door, and ends in the long central hallway

hallway_to_cellar.mp4.label: cellar from hallway
hallway_to_cellar.mp4.promptText: camera moves from the central hallway through a wooden cellar door, descends the wooden staircase, and ends in a dim cellar lit by a single bare bulb
